title: notebook-status output data
description:
Per-section audit statuses + the whole-module gate verdict.

``passed`` is the graduation-gate predicate: every required section is
current (``signed_current`` / ``auto_cleared`` / ``reused``). It is the rollup
T9 consumes; a false ``passed`` names the drifted/unsigned sections in
``sections``.

sections.description: Per required-section status, in template order.
sections.title: Sections

passed.description: True iff every required section is current (signed_current, auto_cleared, or reused) — the graduation gate's pass predicate.
passed.title: Passed

module_attention.description: ONE item per UNSIGNED linked src module (never per dependent) — sign the module to clear all its dependent sections at once. Empty when every linked module is signed or the audit links none.
module_attention.title: Module Attention

NotebookModuleAttention.description:
ONE attention charge for an UNSIGNED linked src module (wave-3 piece 3).

Attention is charged per CHANGED PIECE, never per dependent: a src module an
audited section imports under a ``source_root`` costs the human ONE look when
its current content is unsigned — not one per dependent section. Signing the
module (``notebook-module-sign-off``) clears every dependent at once. A SIGNED
module produces no item.
NotebookModuleAttention.title: notebook module attention item

NotebookSectionStatus.description: The reduced audit state of one required section.
NotebookSectionStatus.title: notebook section status
